headline: Design-quality tooling landed: curated impeccable skill subset + official shadcn skill pinned in skills-lock.json (HDS stays shadcn-oriented per ADR-001), and a new manual guardrail check-impeccable-detect wraps `npx impeccable detect` (46 deterministic anti-pattern rules) with real proof-of-firing fixtures. Epic #124 token-utility burndown remains the active roadmap; package published as @hirobius/design-system on npm.
next: Continue burning down epic #124's remaining children: #126, #128, #129, #130, #132, #133, #134
Restore pull_request/push triggers in .github/workflows/{chromatic,release}.yml — still manual-dispatch-only from the freeze, now stale
Reconcile the superseded wind-down epic #80 now that #124 is the active roadmap
Triage the 3 real check-impeccable-detect findings in src/ (card.tsx width transition, tabs.tsx border accent, fonts.css Geist Mono — last one is a deliberate brand choice, add an inline ignore)
Decide whether HDS adds a minimal components.json so the shadcn skill gets full project-awareness
